title: ClickHouse & Telemetry Capacity
description: ClickHouse runtime health and observability storage growth.

targets.rawSql: SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS up FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'clickhouse' AND MetricName = 'up'
SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS memory FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'clickhouse' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_MemoryTracking'
SELECT sum(bytes_on_disk) AS bytes FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = 'otel'
SELECT count() AS parts FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = 'otel'

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS memory FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'clickhouse' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_MemoryTracking' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, MetricName, max(Value)-min(Value) AS operations FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'clickhouse' AND MetricName IN ('ClickHouseProfileEvents_Query','ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertQuery','ClickHouseProfileEvents_SelectQuery') GROUP BY time, MetricName ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, ServiceName, avg(Value) AS duration FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'scrape_duration_seconds' GROUP BY time, ServiceName ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, ServiceName, avg(Value) AS samples FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'scrape_samples_scraped' GROUP BY time, ServiceName ORDER BY time
SELECT table, sum(rows) AS rows, formatReadableSize(sum(bytes_on_disk)) AS disk, count() AS parts FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = 'otel' GROUP BY table ORDER BY sum(bytes_on_disk) DESC

SELECT replaceOne(MetricName, 'ClickHouseErrorMetric_', '') AS error, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS total FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'clickhouse' AND startsWith(MetricName, 'ClickHouseErrorMetric_') AND Value > 0 GROUP BY MetricName ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 50
